title: 18” Stiff Broom Outdoor Heavy Duty with Wooden Handle Natural Bassine Hard Bristle Yard Brush Factory Warehouse Floors Commercial and Industrial Broom Strong Wooden Brush (Pack of 1)
features: [ Wide Broom with Wooden Handle ] Stiff Bassine Bristles sweeping brush outdoor with natural bassine fill which can withstand the toughest jobs for outdoor cleaning and is a perfect outside brush for sweeping on all hard grounds and garden.

[ Wet and Dry Usage ] This outdoor stiff hard bristle broom head is suitable for wet and dry surfaces. Stiff Garden Broom for outdoor heads are made from high-quality wood to avoid mould build-up and can be used for a long time.

[ MultiPurpose Cleaning Stiff Bristles Broom ] Outdoor Yard Brush the hard bristle cleaning brush is made of a wooden head with a stiff natural bassine making it an ideal hard brush for garden, decking, driveway, yard and patios.

[ Light Weight Easy To Use ] Outdoor Stiff Cleaning Broom Head is lightweight and easy to use for cleaning your driveway or garden. Bristles clear Water and Leaves etc quite easily and leave the Decking Grooves clear and clean. Great outdoor complete broom with 120cm long metal handle including a Plastic handle end with hanging hook.

[ Pack Includes ] 1x 18 inches wide Broom made of Hard Bassine Material with 120 cm Long Handle for Easy Sweeping. This comes as unassembled broom head and handle. You can easily assemble it by pushing handle into the plastic socket on the broom head.

EDS 18” Garden Broom Merchant video Indoor & Outdoor Use Brooms with stiffer bristles and durable construction are suitable for outdoor cleaning tasks. Brooms are used to sweep patios, driveways, decks, walkways, or garden areas to remove leaves, dirt, debris, and other outdoor messes. Versatile for concrete, asphalt, patio stones, wood decks. Hard Bristles Bristles are designed to be stiff, providing excellent sweeping action and effectively capturing dirt, debris, and leaves. The bristles have a resilient nature, allowing them to maintain their shape and effectiveness even after extended use. The stiff bristles have a high capacity for holding debris. Previous page Easy to Install Bracket The broom comes with a bracket that is quick and simple to install. Hard Bristles Hard Bristles The broom made from bassine material, provide effective sweeping for clearing debris and dirt. Long Wooden Handle Long Wooden Handle The wooden handle offers a sturdy grip and allows for comfortable use while sweeping.
